title: Deliverable
description: The final renderable artifact emitted by the Renderer immediately before channel delivery. Aggregates every sub-agent's output into the structured payload a channel adapter renders. This is the schema that gates `message_sending` — failures here block delivery.

enum: RESEARCH INCOMPLETE — DO NOT RELY ON THIS DRAFT
stamp.description: Mandatory banner on every deliverable. PRD §3 non-goal 2 — outputs are never client-facing without human review.

verbatim_question.description: Original message, echoed at the top of every deliverable. Sourced from TaskSpec.verbatim_question.

bottom_line.description: One- or two-sentence answer. Required at the top of every deliverable (Slack-response template puts this first; memo template puts it in the executive summary). Hedge density in this field is held to a tighter W3 threshold than the analysis body.

analysis.description: The full analytical prose. Composed by the Renderer from the ordered claims. Contains paraphrased text but no raw quotation marks — quoted spans are rendered from the quotes[] array.

claims.description: Ordered list of claims that produced the analysis. Used for audit / click-through; not always rendered to the channel adapter.

cites.description: Pinpoint citations supporting the analysis. R14 enforces citation_eligible kinds only.

consulted_for.description: What this orientation source was consulted for. R14 surfaces this in the deliverable's 'Orientation consulted' block, clearly labeled as non-authority.

references.description: Orientation-only sources consulted. Never appears in cites[]; appears in a separate 'Orientation consulted' rendering block.

claim_id.description: Reference to the claim this quote appears within.

quotes.description: All anchored quoted spans in the deliverable. R4 + R5 enforce.

location_in_draft.description: Where in the draft the flag applies, e.g., 'paragraph 3, sentence 2'.

why_flagged.description: Concrete uncertainty. Generic hedges fail this minLength.

suggested_verification.description: Specific next step (a search query, a doc to pull). Generic 'have someone check' fails.

verify_flags.description: R13 VerifyFlagCap: maxItems=3 enforced by schema.

coverage_matrix.description: W1 PartialAcrossStates. Required when TaskSpec.jurisdictions.length > 1. Keys are jurisdiction codes; values describe per-state coverage.

details.description: Rule-specific payload, e.g., W3 includes hedge counts; W2 includes prev/curr paraphrase + source.

canon_conflicts.description: W4 CanonConflictDeclared. Explicit declarations when 2+ canons fire on the same claim and produce different outcomes.

confidence.description: R11 LowConfidenceGate. When aggregate=LOW, this deliverable's stamp is 'RESEARCH INCOMPLETE'.

delivery_metadata.description: Channel-specific metadata. For slack: { channel_id, thread_ts, message_id }. For web: { session_id }. Not validated structurally — channel adapter owns the shape.

include_audit_trail.description: When true, the Renderer attaches a link to the claim ledger and audit chain in the rendered output.

include_orientation.description: When false, references[] is omitted from the rendered output (but still logged in the audit chain).

allOf.description: When stamp is 'RESEARCH INCOMPLETE', confidence.aggregate must be LOW. Asymmetric — a LOW confidence may also be delivered with the normal stamp when explicitly overridden in some Phase 4+ scenarios (not v1).

stamp.const: RESEARCH INCOMPLETE — DO NOT RELY ON THIS DRAFT
